caption: A man with blonde hair, glasses, and white over-ear headphones speaks while sitting in a studio. He wears a dark blue patterned t-shirt. In the background, a lit Christmas tree stands to the left, and a framed digital screen displays the number "20" alongside a blue logo. A black microphone on a boom arm is positioned in front of him. He begins by gesturing with both hands open and palms up, his mouth open as he speaks. He then brings his hands down and continues talking, maintaining a focused expression. The scene concludes with a close-up shot of his face, highlighting his glasses and headphones as he looks slightly to the side. The lighting remains consistent across the sequence, and the background environment stays stationary as the camera shifts from a medium shot to a tight close-up.
